description: Your civil engineering firm is conducting a thermal deformation risk assessment for the Trans-Australian Railway. Using NASA Panoply and the monthly air temperature climatology dataset in ~/PanoplyData/, extract the required extreme temperatures for January and July and compute the seasonal thermal amplitude as specified in the mandate at ~/Desktop/railway_engineering_mandate.txt. Provide standardized visual outputs with explicitly locked colorbar limits and save all deliverables to ~/Documents/RailRisk/.
